title: Tsu,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tsu, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tsu is a city in with a population of 280,000. The capital of Mie Prefecture, a quiet coastal city with access to Ise Shrine, Japan’s most sacred Shinto site.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
